title: Trim Effect
description: A plugin that gives customizable effect to trims, very customizable.
body:
This plugins apply customizable effect to any trim on the armor. The trim and effects aren't hardcoded meaning you can customize nearly everything inside the plugin. Want some trim to be useless? delete it from config and reload. 

![Config Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b0f9f804f087e4805ffefe56b7d8288572406a5.png)
